indications.text:
Maintenance of Normal Sinus Rhythm (Delay in AF/AFl Recurrence)
TIKOSYN is indicated for the maintenance of normal sinus rhythm (delay in time to recurrence
of atrial fibrillation/atrial flutter [AF/AFl]) in patients with atrial fibrillation/atrial flutter of
greater than one week duration who have ...
